CancelSession.description: Grants permission to cancel an approval session

CreateApprovalTeam.description: Grants permission to create an approval team

CreateIdentitySource.description: Grants permission to create an identity source

DeleteIdentitySource.description: Grants permission to delete an identity source

DeleteInactiveApprovalTeamVersion.description: Grants permission to delete an inactive approval team

DeleteResourcePolicy.description: Grants permission to delete a resource policy

GetApprovalTeam.description: Grants permission to retrieve details for an approval team

GetIdentitySource.description: Grants permission to retrieve details for an identity source

GetPolicyVersion.description: Grants permission to retrieve details for a policy

GetResourcePolicy.description: Grants permission to retrieve details for a specific resource

GetSession.description: Grants permission to retrieve details for an approval session

ListApprovalTeams.description: Grants permission to list approval teams

ListIdentitySources.description: Grants permission to list identity sources

ListPolicyVersions.description: Grants permission to list the versions for policies

ListResourcePolicies.description: Grants permission to list policies for a resource

ListSessions.description: Grants permission to list approval sessions

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list tags for a resource

PutResourcePolicy.description: Grants permission to create or update policies for a resource

StartActiveApprovalTeamDeletion.description: Grants permission to start the deletion process for an active approval team

StartApprovalTeamBaseline.description: Grants permission to start a baseline for an active approval team

StartSession.description: Grants permission to start an approval session

TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag a resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to untag a resource

UpdateApprovalTeam.description: Grants permission to update approval team

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by a tag key and value pair that is allowed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by a tag key and value pair of a resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by a list of tag keys that are allowed in the request

mpa:ProtectedResourceAccount.description: Filters access by the account that owns the resource that is the target of the operation that requires approval

mpa:RequestedOperation.description: Filters access by a requested operation that requires team approval before it can be executed
